subcodes.title: Words to pilgrims, spoken on 1906-07-06
subcodes.first_line: The believers must not be influenced by the conditions in Akka, be Akka in a state of calm or confusion. No matter what happens in Akka
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @Mary Magdalene, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
